sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69280" key="murio/naus" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῡρῐό-ναυς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">αος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n69280.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with countless ships</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἄρης</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.237</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alph.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
